g.text: Offline SOS Relay + AI Incident Command + Rescue Lifecycle
“When networks fail, people become the network.”
COORDINATES: KEDARNATH FIELD GRID [30.73° N, 79.06° E]
SYSTEM STATUS: OPERATIONAL // ASI:ONE AGENT ACTIVE
Injects disaster events into the mesh network
> [SIM] ACTIVE LANDSLIDE EVENT INJECTED IN SEC 4
SOS hops dynamically between offline civilian devices
> Broadcasted packet ID #47b9 via Bluetooth P2P mesh
> Sync complete: HopCount=3. Packet reached Camp Gateway Node
Turns raw offline telemetry into rescue intelligence
Connected nodes that sync offline packets to command DB
Any connected node can sync cached SOS packets to the command system.
Realtime incident coordination center for dispatchers
Summary: Landslide blockage. Evacuation route calculated.
Stores SOS alerts, relay events, volunteers, system status, completed rescues, and operational logs.
| After rescue, marker fades from map and card moves to Completed Rescues.
| Used for demo replay, audit trail, training, and after-action review.
ResQMesh keeps emergency communication alive when infrastructure fails.
